title: Senior Revenue Manager at Treebo Hotels

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Treebo Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Treebo Hotels in Srinagar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Treebo Hotels:
Treebo Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
